【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-235289920_59488760<br>vk.com/topic-237847580_59488768<br>vk.com/topic-231239251_60018361<br>vk.com/topic-238165082_59007883<br>vk.com/topic-238147939_59152888<br>vk.com/topic-235289920_59488799<br>vk.com/topic-231239860_59488801<br>vk.com/topic-231239251_60018388<br>vk.com/topic-238165082_59007906<br>vk.com/topic-237849573_58655669<br>vk.com/topic-231213262_59007911<br>vk.com/topic-231239860_59488831<br>vk.com/topic-231188933_58655695<br>vk.com/topic-231239251_60018417<br>vk.com/topic-237849573_58655699<br>vk.com/topic-231213262_59007939<br>vk.com/topic-238147906_58699463<br>vk.com/topic-237847580_59488878<br>vk.com/topic-231188933_58655729<br>vk.com/topic-231519063_58655730<br>vk.com/topic-238147939_59152988<br>vk.com/topic-238147906_58699492<br>vk.com/topic-237847580_59488918<br>vk.com/topic-231188933_58655756<br>vk.com/topic-231519063_58655758<br>vk.com/topic-238147939_59153022<br>vk.com/topic-235289920_59488939<br>vk.com/topic-238147945_58260872<br>vk.com/topic-238165082_59008004<br>vk.com/topic-231239251_60018509<br>vk.com/topic-237849573_58655794<br>vk.com/topic-235289920_59488973<br>vk.com/topic-231239860_59488977<br>vk.com/topic-237847
